allow: PowerShell($env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", "User"\); python generate_subreddit_rss.py TorontoRaves "Only include posts about local Toronto rave or party events with a specific date or venue. Exclude memes, gear questions, music releases, set recordings, and general discussion.")

PowerShell(python -c "import requests; r = requests.get\('https://www.reddit.com/r/TorontoRaves/new/.rss?limit=25', headers={'User-Agent': 'python:rss-digest:v1.0 \(by /u/frownigami\)'}\); print\(r.status_code, r.headers.get\('x-ratelimit-remaining'\), r.headers.get\('retry-after'\)\)")
